intro.title: llmfit
intro.desc: New: [Community Leaderboard](#community-leaderboard-b)** — Browse real-world performance data from actual users. Press `b` to see measured tok/s, TTFT, and VRAM for any GPU — not just yours. Pick from 27+ hardware presets (RTX 5090 to Apple M1) with `H` to compare real numbers before you buy or build.
